articles.title_en: See the aftermath of one of Russia’s largest attacks on Kyiv. Apartment buildings lie in ruins, at least 18 people were killed, and dozens were injured.
articles.lead_en: Russian forces attacked Kyiv overnight on July 2 with drones, ballistic missiles, and cruise missiles. Kyiv Mayor Vitali Klitschko said the strike on the Ukrainian capital was the most massive since the start of the full-scale war.
articles.title_raw: See the aftermath of one of Russia’s largest attacks on Kyiv. Apartment buildings lie in ruins, at least 18 people were killed, and dozens were injured.
articles.lead_raw: Russian forces attacked Kyiv overnight on July 2 with drones, ballistic missiles, and cruise missiles. Kyiv Mayor Vitali Klitschko said the strike on the Ukrainian capital was the most massive since the start of the full-scale war.

articles.title_en: Russia to send aircraft to Turkey to fight forest fires
articles.lead_en: In response to a request from the Turkish authorities, two Be-200 aircraft will soon be deployed to support efforts in extinguishing seasonal wildfires
articles.title_raw: Russia to send aircraft to Turkey to fight forest fires
articles.lead_raw: In response to a request from the Turkish authorities, two Be-200 aircraft will soon be deployed to support efforts in extinguishing seasonal wildfires

articles.title_en: Russia will send planes to Turkey to fight forest fires
articles.lead_en: The Russian Embassy reported that Moscow will send two Be-200ES aircraft
articles.title_raw: Россия направит в Турцию самолеты для борьбы с лесными пожарами
articles.lead_raw: Посольство РФ сообщило, что Москва отправит два самолета Бе-200ЧС
